title: Consensus later-round seat response
description: One seat's rebuttal/refinement response for Round 2 onward: what changed after seeing the anonymized moderator digest, what it concedes, what it still objects to, and its best next step.

updated_position.description: The seat's current position after reading the moderator digest, self-contained.

what_changed.description: What changed versus the seat's previous round, and why. State 'nothing' explicitly if unchanged.

points_conceded.description: Points from other positions the seat now concedes.

remaining_objections.description: Objections the seat still holds, each concrete enough to act on.

best_next_step.description: The single most valuable next step the seat recommends for the council or the user.

confidence.description: The seat's confidence (0-100) in its updated position.
